facts: 96 ChEMBL configurations across 5 domain split axes (assay/scaffold/size/protein/protein-family); LBAP/SBAP variants.
hypotheses: The 5 axes correlate in ChEMBL (scaffold approximates size) rather than being statistically independent.
intuitions: DrugOOD-2 updates and cross-DrugOOD-TDC scaffold-split agreement work likely exist.
unknowns: Whether 'assay' as environment is assay-meta or assay-instance granularity cannot be determined because it is buried in the curation script.
